free_text: Experimental kerma coefficients and dose distributions
of C, N, O, Mg, Al, Si, Fe, Zr, A-150 plastic, Al2O3,
AlN, SiO2 and ZrO2 for neutron energies up to 66 MeV
correction on low neutron energy tail at En > 34. MeV
including the results of the present work and an
extensive discussion and comparisons with theoretical
For producing neutrons with energies 5 MeV and
For producing neutrons with energies 15.0 MeV
.Kerma factors are derived from absorbed dose measure-

Long counter for neutron flux monitoring
U-238 fission foil chamber for neutron flux

uncertainty in the ratio of the W value
averaged over the dose distribution of neutron
energy En and the W value of the 'edges'
